Alexandra Rivera

Data Scientist & ML Engineer

a.rivera@email.com | (555) 789-0123 | github.com/arivera | New York, NY

Experience

Senior ML Engineer — Meta AI Research New York, NY 2021-04 – Present
  • Developed recommendation models serving 3B+ users, improving engagement by 12%
  • Published 2 papers at NeurIPS on efficient transformer architectures
  • Built MLOps pipeline reducing model deployment time from 2 weeks to 4 hours
Quantitative Researcher — Two Sigma New York, NY 2018-08 – 2021-03
  • Built predictive models for equity trading strategies generating $40M+ annual alpha
  • Designed real-time feature engineering pipeline processing 500K events/sec

Selected Projects

FastTransformer — Open-source efficient attention library (2.1K GitHub stars)

CityPredict — Urban mobility forecasting model, 1st place NYC Open Data Challenge 2020

Education

M.S., Computer Science (ML Focus) — Columbia University 2016 – 2018
GPA: 3.95
